hero.roles: Python Developer, Full Stack Developer, Data Analyst

about.exp_title: of working experience in Python, Web, IA and Data
about.desc1:
Passionate about designing high-impact digital solutions, I build and deploy robust web applications and data pipelines. My expertise includes Python and JavaScript — along with their frameworks — as well as data analysis and value creation.

Detail-oriented, adaptable, and experienced in hybrid environments, I integrate easily into multidisciplinary teams, both on-site and remotely, to address each organization’s business challenges.
about.desc2: Three companies, two countries, five years of experience — and just as many technical challenges tackled: automation, architecture migration, APIs, and Machine Learning. I turn complex business needs into reliable, maintainable, and long-lasting solutions.

skills.title: Skills & Expertise
skills.subtitle: Complete mastery of the software development cycle, focusing on Python (Django/FastAPI) and JavaScript / PHP technologies, coupled with skills in Machine Learning and Data Analysis.
skills.exp1_desc: Design of automated systems for travel and fleet management, development of APIs for driver mobile applications, migration from Java JSP to Django, and application of Machine Learning for transport resource allocation.
skills.exp2_desc: Development and maintenance of robust REST APIs, troubleshooting software issues, and database administration to ensure the reliability and performance of client systems.
skills.exp3_desc: Design and deployment of an interactive platform for business management and professional training, leading the full development lifecycle in close collaboration with stakeholders.
skills.edu1_title: Master of Science BIHAR - Big Data & AI
skills.edu1_desc: Big Data Architecture, NLP, Computer Vision, Distributed Systems.
skills.edu2_desc: n-tier web/mobile applications, SQL/NoSQL, Project Management.

services.title: Services I Offer
services.subtitle: Comprehensive software development services tailored to your needs
services.s1_desc: Full-stack web development with Python (Django, FastAPI, Flask), PHP (Laravel), and JavaScript (Angular, Vue.js). From REST API backend to responsive frontend, I deliver scalable and maintainable solutions.
services.s2_desc: Design, development and documentation of robust REST APIs (FastAPI, Django REST). Secure authentication, versioning, integration with third-party services and high-performance optimization.
services.s3_desc: Building ML models with Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Pandas and Numpy. Expertise in classification, prediction, NLP and computer vision applied to real-world business problematics.
services.s4_desc: Intelligent automation pipelines with n8n, Python scripts and AI agents (LLMs). Workflow orchestration to eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce costs and accelerate your business processes.
services.s5_desc: Transformation of raw data into actionable dashboards with Power BI, Pandas and Numpy. Data analysis, KPI definition and clear reporting to support informed decision-making.

seo.title: Ranjelison Vonjitahina Charles | Portfolio
seo.description: Discover the portfolio of Ranjelison Vonjitahina Charles: Software Engineer, Backend Developer (Python, API REST), Full Remote Developer specializing in IA automation and Data.
